case_title: DAWN HASSELL VS. WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED JUN-22-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASSELL, DAWN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY (IF ANY) WAS CAUSED BY AN ACT OR OMISSION OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HASSELL, DAWN AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DAWN HASSELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIMA-SONOMA STORES, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KYLE CATO, ASSOCIATE RISK MANAGER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-02-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.
